---
applyTo: '**'
---
Verification Protocol: After implementing any frontend update OR any backend modification that affects API schemas, data structures, or state management, you must proactively verify the user interface.

Identify Impact: Determine if the change alters what the user sees or how they interact with the page.

Execute Test: Use the Chrome DevTools MCP server to launch the relevant frontend route.

Validate: Confirm that the UI renders correctly, console errors are absent, and the integration with the backend remains intact.

Report: Briefly summarize the visual/functional status as part of your task completion.
